5376.en: fond of horses; Philippus, the name of four Israelites

5399.en: to frighten, i.e. (passively) to be alarmed; by analogy, to be in awe of, i.e. revere

5417.en: to whip, i.e. lash as a public punishment

5418.en: a fence, or inclosing barrier (literally or figuratively)

5426.en: to exercise the mind, i.e. entertain or have a sentiment or opinion; by implication, to be (mentally) disposed (more or less earnestly in a certain direction); intensively, to interest oneself in (with concern or obedience)
5426.kjv: set the affection on, (be) care(-ful), (be like-, + be of one, + be of the same, + let this) mind(-ed), regard, savour, think

5438.en: a guarding or (concretely, guard), the act, the person; figuratively, the place, the condition, or (specially), the time (as a division of day or night), literally or figuratively

5442.en: to watch, i.e. be on guard (literally of figuratively); by implication, to preserve, obey, avoid

5452.en: to set out in the earth, i.e. implant; figuratively, to instil doctrine

5455.en: to emit a sound (animal, human or instrumental); by implication, to address in words or by name, also in imitation

5456.en: a tone (articulate, bestial or artificial); by implication, an address (for any purpose), saying or language

5457.en: compare G5316 (φαίνω), G5346 (φημί)); luminousness (in the widest application, natural or artificial, abstract or concrete, literal or figurative)

5463.en: to be "cheer"ful, i.e. calmly happy or well-off; impersonally, especially as salutation (on meeting or parting), be well
5463.kjv: farewell, be glad, God speed, greeting, hall, joy(- fully), rejoice

5475.en: copper (the substance, or some implement or coin made of it)

5479.kjv: gladness, X greatly, (X be exceeding) joy(-ful, -fully, -fulness, -ous)

5491.en: a lip (as a pouring place); figuratively, a margin (of water)

5494.en: akin to the base of 5490 through the idea of a channel), meaning a storm (as pouring rain); by implication, the rainy season, i.e. winter

5495.en: the hand (literally or figuratively (power); especially (by Hebraism) a means or instrument)

5501.en: from an obsolete equivalent (of uncertain derivation); more evil or aggravated (physically, mentally or morally)

5503.en: a widow (as lacking a husband), literally or figuratively

5506.en: the commander of a thousand soldiers ("chiliarch"; i.e. colonel

5522.en: a heap (as poured out), i.e. rubbish; loose dirt

5526.en: to fodder, i.e. (generally) to gorge (supply food in abundance)

5528.en: a "court" or "garden", i.e. (by implication, of pasture) herbage or vegetation

5532.en: employment, i.e. an affair; also (by implication) occasion, demand, requirement or destitution
5532.kjv: business, lack, necessary(-ity), need(-ful), use, want

5536.en: something useful or needed, i.e. wealth, price

5547.en: anointed, i.e. the Messiah, an epithet of Jesus

5550.en: a space of time (in general, and thus properly distinguished from G2540 (καιρός), which designates a fixed or special occasion; and from G165 (αἰών), which denotes a particular period) or interval; by extension, an individual opportunity; by implication, delay
5550.kjv: + years old, season, space, (X often-)time(-s), (a) while

5561.en: room, i.e. a space of territory (more or less extensive; often including its inhabitants)
5561.kjv: coast, county, fields, ground, land, region

5562.en: to be in (give) space, i.e. (intransitively) to pass, enter, or (transitively) to hold, admit (literally or figuratively)
5562.kjv: come, contain, go, have place, (can, be room to) receive

5563.en: to place room between, i.e. part; reflexively, to go away

5564.en: a spot or plot of ground
5564.kjv: field, land, parcel of ground, place, possession

5565.en: at a space, i.e. separately or apart from (often as preposition)

5576.en: to be an untrue testifier, i.e. offer falsehood in evidence

5578.en: a spurious prophet, i.e. pretended foreteller or religious impostor

5590.en: breath, i.e. (by implication) spirit, abstractly or concretely (the animal sentient principle only; thus distinguished on the one hand from G4151 (πνεῦμα), which is the rational and immortal soul; and on the other from G2222 (ζωή), which is mere vitality, even of plants: these terms thus exactly correspond respectively to the Hebrew H05315, H07307 and H02416)
5590.kjv: heart (+ -ily), life, mind, soul, + us, + you

5599.en: as a sign of the vocative case, O; as a note of exclamation, oh

5602.en: in this same spot, i.e. here or hither

5604.en: a pang or throe, especially of childbirth

5610.kjv: day, hour, instant, season, X short, (even-)tide, (high) time

5613.en: which how, i.e. in that manner (very variously used, as follows)
5613.kjv: about, after (that), (according) as (it had been, it were), as soon (as), even as (like), for, how (greatly), like (as, unto), since, so (that), that, to wit, unto, when(-soever), while, X with all speed

5614.en: oh save!; hosanna (i.e. hoshia-na), an exclamation of adoration

5615.en: as thus, i.e. in the same way
5615.kjv: even so, likewise, after the same (in like) manner

5616.kjv: about, as (it had been, it were), like (as)

5620.en: so too, i.e. thus therefore (in various relations of consecution, as follow)
5620.kjv: (insomuch) as, so that (then), (insomuch) that, therefore, to, wherefore

5621.en: an earlet, i.e. one of the ears, or perhaps the lobe of the ear

5623.en: to be useful, i.e. to benefit
